title: Benchmarking Detection Transfer Learning with Vision Transformers
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text states MAE ViT-B/ViT-L weights pretrained by the MAE authors are used and benchmarked for COCO detection/segmentation transfer.

title: PeCo: Perceptual Codebook for BERT Pre-training of Vision Transformers
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text compares PeCo with MAE and introduces PeCoMAE by adopting the MAE framework/asymmetric encoder-decoder design.

title: MC-SSL0.0: Towards Multi-Concept Self-Supervised Learning
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text says the proposed SSL framework is based on GMML for masked autoencoder ideas and cites He et al. for masked-autoencoder pretext learning.

title: A Framework for Evaluating the Efficacy of Foundation Embedding Models in Healthcare
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text evaluates vision embedding models that include ViT models trained with Masked Autoencoders.

title: SLOTMFound: Foundation-Based Diagnosis of Multiple Sclerosis Using Retinal SLO Imaging and OCT Thickness-maps
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text describes RETFound/MAE pretraining and says SLOFound uses masked image modeling with a masked autoencoder architecture.

title: From Slices to Volumes: A Scalable Pipeline for Developing General-Purpose Brain MRI Foundation Models
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text includes MAE-ViT among slice foundation models and reports downstream MRI task evaluation.

title: Point-BERT: Pre-training 3D Point Cloud Transformers with Masked Point Modeling
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text cites MAE as a masked-autoencoder strategy and adapts masked modeling to point clouds with masked point modeling and reconstruction.

title: Geometric deep learning improves generalizability of MHC-bound peptide predictions
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text cites MAE as an SSL example and uses masked residue prediction, but the evidence does not show direct MAE architecture/model use.

title: Learning Neighborhood-Scale Cross-Dependencies Among Air Pollutants, Meteorology and Land Cover Using Mobile Sensing and Transformers
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text trains a transformer-based masked autoencoder to impute masked pollutant/meteorology maps, with synthetic pretraining and field-data fine-tuning.

title: A robust multi-scale clustering framework for single-cell RNA-seq data analysis
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text discusses and benchmarks against scMAE, but the proposed method is scMSCF rather than MAE-based.

title: Contrastive Learning for Sign Language Recognition and Translation
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text explicitly says random visual masking is added inspired by MAE to improve visual representation learning.

title: View-label driven cross-space structure alignment for incomplete multi-view partial multi-label classification
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text proposes an autoencoder and random masking strategy inspired by He et al. for missing-view reconstruction.

title: PillarNeSt: Embracing Backbone Scaling and Pretraining for Pillar-Based 3D Object Detection
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text only mentions masked image modeling/MAE as possible future generative pretraining; implemented method uses ConvNeXt-style image-domain pretraining.

title: A foundation model for generalized brain MRI analysis
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text states BrainIAC uses SimCLR-based contrastive pretraining; MAE is cited only as a possible newer SSL framework/future direction.

title: Vision Transformer Autoencoders for Unsupervised Representation Learning: Revealing Novel Genetic Associations through Learned Sparse Attention Patterns
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text cites MAE and uses a ViT autoencoder with reconstruction, but the evidence supports MAE-adjacent autoencoding rather than masked-autoencoder use.

title: PBSCR: The Piano Bootleg Score Composer Recognition Dataset
fulltext_evidence_summary: Full text mentions ViT-MAE/masked autoencoding as an open future research question; reported baselines use GPT-2/RoBERTa-style pretraining, not MAE.
